root: ^A small blue streak of liquid has run down from under your car.

b: ^ I know it wasn't real piss, I was just joking...

root: ^Looks like someone took a piss here, right underneath my car. For shame.

b: ^Wait, this isn't just any piss... It's my car's piss! The coolant must have leaked.
^Fixing this is no big deal. Go back and take another look under the hood again.
^This is the power of Detective Vision...

^Something important to keep in mind is that not all items will be highlighted through your Detective Vision at all times. More often than not, you must unlock a certain requirement until it can become highlighted.
^This can be anything from having to gain knowledge about something through dialogue with characters, or even finding other clues.
^If something catches your eye but it isn't highlighted while using your Detective Vision, try coming back to it later! It might just be because you're missing a piece of the puzzle.
